case_title: TERRIS A ABHAYA VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY ABHAYA, TERRIS A AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO B.A.R.T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVE SHATZ, LIABILITY RISK ANALYST FILED BY DEFENDANT B.A.R.T.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S STATUTE OF LIMITATION HAD RUN AT THE TIME OF FILING THE CLAIM AND THAT THE ISSUE IS TIME BARRED. PLAINTIFF TERRIS A. ABHAYA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESENTED BY GRACE M. GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BART, REPRESENTED BY STEVE SHATZ, LIABILITY RISK ANALYST IS PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ABHAYA, TERRIS A
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-27-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABHAYA, TERRIS A AS TO DEFENDANT B.A.R.T.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-30-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT B.A.R.T.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABHAYA, TERRIS A AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-30-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-07-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (HEARING SET FOR MAY 7, 2021); (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS. TIME BARRED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
